commands.review_summary:
This PR restyles the Bindings WinUI page header, spacing, list row typography, item stretching, and routing arrow icon to better match the Fluent/Win11 settings pattern.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: the changed title TextBlock still has x:Uid="BindingsPage_TextBlock_16", and Resources.resw still supplies the emoji-bearing title value.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs contributor follow-up for localized resources and real behavior proof; automation should not take over while the proof gate is still missing.

target.title: Organize Bindings page to match Fluent / Win11 Settings pattern
target.body:
Minimal UI-only cleanup of the Bindings page to align with the openclaw-design Fluent guidance.

- Drop the emoji from the page title; use system text styles in the row template instead of literal `FontSize`/`FontWeight`.
- Remove the redundant outer `Grid` so content centers with growing white side bars when the window widens (matches `PermissionsPage`: `StackPanel` with `HorizontalAlignment=Stretch` + `MaxWidth=900`).
- Replace the literal `ã` `TextBlock` with a Segoe Fluent `FontIcon` (`E72A`) tinted via `TextFillColorSecondaryBrush`.
- Stretch `ListView` items to the full card width via `ItemContainerStyle`.

Validated: `./build.ps1` ã, Shared.Tests ã, Tray.Tests ã.
target.author: bkudiess
